title: CBB Appendix OM-2 Cloud Outsourcing Control Guidelines
summary: Requires controls over where data is stored, changes to data location, subcontractor arrangements, transfer or deletion of data, and customer or licensee awareness of cloud outsourcing risks.

theme_notes.data_privacy.crossborder_data_flows: Provides data-location and transfer controls for cloud outsourcing.
theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.cloud_dat: Detailed cloud outsourcing control guidelines for CBB licensees.

notes: Related instruments: CBB OM-2A Cloud Outsourcing Arrangements
